---
name: Safety or privacy issue
about: Report a safety, privacy, or data-handling concern
title: "[Safety] "
labels: safety
---

> Important: Do not include real patient data, protected health information (PHI), secrets, or institution-sensitive content in this report. Do not paste or link to the sensitive content itself. For sensitive disclosures, prefer GitHub private vulnerability reporting or contacting a maintainer directly, as described in `SECURITY.md`.

## Type of concern

- [ ] Possible real patient data or PHI in the repository
- [ ] Committed secret or credential
- [ ] Skill or example encourages unsafe healthcare AI use
- [ ] Misleading clinical claim
- [ ] Other

## Where is the concern

File path or location (without copying the sensitive content).

## Description

Describe the concern at a high level.

## Suggested fix, if any

Optional.

## Reminder

This repository is not for clinical emergencies or patient-specific medical advice. If you are facing a medical emergency, contact your local emergency services.
